title: coupon — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — owner + marketing manage coupons + read redemption ledger; support role reads only; customers have no explicit permissions (validate/preview routes are auth'd but scoped to auth()->id() via policy). Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read for support intervention + regulator-facing reporting. All tenant permissions carry the appropriate resource prefix (`coupons.` for the aggregate, `coupon_redemptions.` for the pivot).

permissions.name: coupons.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete only for inactive coupons with no non-reversed redemptions. Retention pipeline handles hard-delete.

permissions.name: coupons.extend
permissions.description: Push valid_until forward. Refuses when the coupon is already deactivated.

permissions.name: coupons.bulk-issue
permissions.description: Medium+ tier via `coupon_bulk_issue` entitlement. Batch-create N unique campaign codes.

permissions.name: coupons.view-financials
permissions.description: Read the confidential fields: discount_amount, discount_currency, usage_cap, minimum_order_amount. Redactor strips these when the caller lacks this permission.

permissions.name: coupons.view-report
permissions.description: Read the weekly coupon usage report.

permissions.name: coupon_redemptions.reverse
permissions.description: Financial reversal — audit-critical. Every reverse fires CouponRedemptionReversed + notifies Finance module.

permissions.name: coupon_redemptions.audit-clawbacks
permissions.description: Read the clawback trail for audit/compliance.

permissions.name: platform.coupon_redemptions.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant redemption ledger for regulator-facing reporting.
